mapper.select: SELECT sl.id, sl.category_id_list, sl.email, sl.is_success, DATE_FORMAT(sl.delivery_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS delivery_date, sd.create_date, c.category_name, sd.title AS news_title, sd.content AS news_content FROM send_log sl LEFT JOIN user u ON sl.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN summary_data sd ON DATE(sl.delivery_date) = DATE(sd.create_date) AND sl.category_id_list LIKE CONCAT('%', sd.category_id, '%') LEFT JOIN category c ON sd.category_id = c.id WHERE sl.id = #{logId} AND u.id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
